headline: Regency Centers Founder Passing Prompts Estate Sales And Valuation Check
summary: Regency Centers co founder Joan Wellhouse Stein Newton has passed away, marking the loss of a key early leader for the company. Following her passing, the Newton family disclosed estate related sales of Regency Centers shares. The company has indicated that these transactions do not change its leadership direction. For investors watching Regency Centers, NasdaqGS:REG, the update comes with the stock recently closing at $76.58 and showing a 12.7% return year to date and a 12.2% return over...

headline: Assessing Regency Centers (REG) Valuation As Modest Undervaluation Signals Meet Solid Long Term Returns
summary: Why Regency Centers is on investors’ radar today Regency Centers (REG) has drawn attention recently as investors weigh its current share price of $76.58 against both its recent total returns and measures of potential intrinsic value. With a value score of 4 and an indicated intrinsic discount of 25.4%, some investors are assessing how its shopping center REIT profile and exposure to suburban retail spending might fit into a diversified, income oriented portfolio.
